task_completion.description: The agent navigates the view to locate the kitchen area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The kitchen (identifiable by cabinets, counters, or appliances) is clearly visible in the main 3D workspace.

task_completion.description: The agent accesses the properties or material selection panel for the kitchen floor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties panel, material dialog, or context menu is open, indicating the floor is selected and ready for editing.

task_completion.description: The agent browses or selects the Wood category in the material options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The material selection dialog shows wood textures, or a 'Wood' category is highlighted/selected in the materials list.

task_completion.description: The kitchen floor material is successfully changed to a hardwood or wood-pattern option.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The floor of the kitchen in the 3D view visibly displays a wood grain or hardwood plank texture, replacing the original material.

integrity.description: The agent used the DreamPlan software interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed by clicking menus, panels, and the 3D view within the DreamPlan application window, rather than using external scripts or terminals.

integrity.description: The material change is genuinely reflected in the 3D model.
integrity.visual_evidence: The wood texture is rendered in perspective on the floor within the 3D environment, not just a flat image pasted over the screen.

integrity.description: The material change was applied specifically to the kitchen floor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The wood flooring is seen in the room containing kitchen appliances and cabinets, rather than a different room in the house.

privileged_info_for_vlm: DreamPlan Home Design Software allows changing flooring materials via a properties panel or right-click context menu. Materials are organized by categories such as Wood, Tile, Carpet, and Stone. To verify the task, ensure the agent navigates to the kitchen in the 'Contemporary House' project, selects the floor, accesses the material properties, and applies a hardwood or wood-pattern texture from the Wood category. The final result should show the kitchen floor rendered with a wood texture in the 3D view.
